title: Senior Software Engineer - MagicBricks - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - MagicBricks - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
